title: Purely Silky Brazilian Tofu Toast
description: A buttery and silky Brazilian dish featuring marinated tofu on toast, perfect for a flexitarian diet. This recipe is light and delicious, making it a great option for any meal.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the brazilian spice blend, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Add the marinated tofu to the preheated skillet and cook for 5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, toast the whole wheat bread until lightly browned.
Butter each slice of toasted bread with unsalted butter.
Place the cooked tofu on top of the buttered toast.
